summary: We went through every button, every form, and every tap in WiseResume and fixed what wasn't working the way it should. This release is for everyone who noticed something felt slightly off — we heard you.

items.title: One Tap to Edit — The Extra Step Is Gone
items.description: Tapping 'Edit' on your resume now takes you straight into the editor. No more landing on a read-only detail screen first. You wanted to edit — we take you there, instantly.

items.title: ATS Improve Always Opens YOUR Resume
items.description: The 'Improve' shortcut in your ATS score breakdown now correctly loads your specific resume every single time. No more opening to a blank slate or someone else's context.

items.title: Every Shortcut Card Goes Exactly Where It Says
items.description: All quick-action cards on the home screen now take you to the right destination regardless of your sign-in status. No more unexpected redirects to login when you're already in the app.

items.title: The Editor Tab Opens Your Editor — Instantly
items.description: The Editor button in the bottom navigation now drops you directly into your resume editor. No detours, no intermediate screens — just your resume, ready to work.

items.title: Templates Guide You Through the Right Steps
items.description: Applying a template when you don't have a resume yet no longer silently fails. WiseResume now gently walks you through creating your first resume before applying your chosen template.

items.title: Signing Out Returns You Home
items.description: Signing out now brings you back to the WiseResume home screen — not the login page. A small detail, but the kind that makes the app feel polished and intentional.

items.title: Your Keyboard Matches What You're Typing
items.description: Phone fields now show a numeric keypad. URL fields bring up the URL keyboard. Email fields open the email layout. Every input field across the app now triggers the right keyboard for the job.

items.title: Autocorrect & Word Suggestions Work Everywhere
items.description: Spellcheck, autocorrect, and word suggestions are now properly enabled across all text fields in the app. Your writing is smoother and smarter without you having to think about it.

summary: WiseResume now turns your resume into a full personal website — complete with themes, AI-written content, and a shareable link you can send to anyone.

items.title: Public Portfolio Website — Now Live
items.description: Turn your resume into a beautiful personal website in one click. Share a real link — not just a PDF — with recruiters, clients, or your network.

items.title: Premium Portfolio Hero + Themes
items.description: The public portfolio page has been completely redesigned with a bold hero, animated avatar glow, role pill badge, sticky header on scroll, and curated themes (Minimal, Bold Dark, Glass Pro, Classic Clean).

items.title: Case Studies + Services Sections
items.description: Add portfolio-only sections — Case Studies (with challenge, outcome, and tech used) and Services (with category, description, and optional pricing) — that live alongside your resume content.

items.title: Resume ↔ Portfolio Sync Mode
items.description: Choose between Auto-sync (portfolio reflects resume changes in real time) or Locked (snapshot your resume content so your portfolio stays fixed while you keep editing).

items.title: AI Portfolio Content Helpers
items.description: AI can now generate your About section, write a Case Study from a project description (challenge + outcome), and craft availability headlines — all with preview-then-confirm flows so you stay in control.

items.title: Portfolio URL Branding
items.description: Your portfolio link now shows your real custom domain everywhere in the app — no more wiseresume.lovable.app references.

items.title: Unsaved Changes Navigation Guard
items.description: Never lose your work again. The editor now detects unsaved changes and prompts you to Save, Discard, or Cancel before navigating away — including Android hardware back button support.

items.title: Offline Sync Conflict Detection
items.description: Smart conflict resolution when syncing offline edits. If a resume was updated on another device, a clear dialog lets you choose between the server version or your local changes.

items.title: Improved Touch Targets
items.description: All interactive elements in the editor and application tracker now meet the 44px accessibility standard, reducing accidental taps on mobile devices.

items.title: Mobile Delete Confirmation
items.description: Deleting a job application on mobile now opens a thumb-friendly bottom drawer for confirmation instead of triggering immediately.

items.title: Editor Section Accessibility
items.description: AI action buttons in resume section headers are now properly sized for comfortable one-handed use on all screen sizes.

items.title: Real-Time AI Health Indicator
items.description: Live AI status badge on all AI-powered pages showing real gateway latency and availability. Tap for details including response time and provider info.

items.title: Dynamic Changelog
items.description: Changelog now loads from a JSON file at runtime instead of being hardcoded. Update release notes without any code changes.

items.title: Settings Page Overhaul
items.description: Added sign-out confirmation, change password flow, privacy toggles for all platforms, account stats card, and guest user prompt.

items.title: Polished Tailor Loading Screen
items.description: Smooth real-feel progress animation with cubic ease-out curve, animated percentage counter, glowing progress bar, estimated time remaining, and fun facts carousel.

items.title: Mobile Scroll Fixes
items.description: Fixed non-scrollable pages on mobile for Job Details, Application Details, Cover Letters, and Notifications pages.

items.title: Enhanced Tailor Step Visualization
items.description: Redesigned step list with vertical connecting lines, spring-animated checkmarks, and highlighted active step with loading spinner.

items.title: Projected Score Preview
items.description: Live projected ATS score comparison (before vs. after) and skill gap count displayed during the tailoring process.

items.title: Smart Progress Estimation
items.description: Estimated time remaining countdown and percentage-based step transitions that adapt to actual backend response time.

items.title: Initial Release
items.description: AI writing assistant, 12 templates, ATS scoring, PDF export, cloud sync, biometric lock, interview prep.
